title: ASR Outdoor 3pc Gemstone Prospecting Kit with Trowel Sieve and Gem ID Chart
description:

This set combines a durable digging tool, an efficient sand sifter, and a handy gemstone ID chart so you can find, sort, and identify your discoveries with ease. ASR Outdoor 3pc Gemstone Prospecting Kit with Trowel Sieve and Gem ID Chart

Discover hidden treasures with the ASR Outdoor 3pc Sieve and Shovel Set, a complete gemstone prospecting bundle for beginners and hobbyists alike. This set combines a durable digging tool, an efficient sand sifter, and a handy gemstone ID chart so you can find, sort, and identify your discoveries with ease.

The bright orange 11" heavy-duty trowel makes digging through soil, gravel, and paydirt quick and effortless. Its sturdy construction ensures reliable use in the field, while the vibrant color makes it easy to spot.

Key Features

  • HEAVY DUTY 11” TROWEL - Bright orange trowel is designed for high visibility out in the field, perfect for digging soil, gravel, and paydirt with ease.
  • STACKABLE SAND SIFTER SIEVE - Durable 9.75" sieve with 36 holes per square inch for efficient sorting of gems and minerals. Please note that sifter colors ship at random.
  • LAMINATED GEMSTONE ID CHART - Take this portable chart with you to quickly and accurately identify gemstones in the field.
  • IDEAL FOR BEGINNERS AND HOBBYISTS - Compact, lightweight, and easy to carry, perfect for gemstone hunting adventures, educational projects, or outdoor fun.
  • COMPLETE 3-PIECE BUNDLE - Everything you need to dig, sift, and identify gemstones in one convenient kit.

Product Specifications

  • MPN: ASR-R45654-4FBH
  • UPC: 810131701420
  • Color: Assorted
  • Size: 3pc

Included is a stackable sand sifter sieve with 36 holes per square inch, perfect for separating dirt and sand to reveal gemstones hidden in your rough mix. Each sieve measures 9.75" in diameter, is built to last, and comes in a random color for added fun.

To help identify your finds, the set includes a laminated gemstone ID chart, compact and portable for field use. Learn to identify precious gems with confidence, whether you’re exploring streams, riverbeds, or paydirt bags.

This lightweight, easy-to-carry set is perfect for gemstone hunting adventures, outdoor education, or family fun in the field. Start your gem-hunting journey today with the ASR Outdoor 3pc Sieve and Shovel Set.
